zh.lifeSummary: 當William Ashe於大約1445年出生在英國英格蘭戴文洛利時，他的父親Sir John Ashe ,MP26歲，母親Alice Wythecombe21歲。他和Rosiana Pitkin至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1538年在英國戴文洛利享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Ashe于大约1445年出生在英国英格兰戴文洛利时，他的父亲Sir John Ashe ,MP26岁，母亲Alice Wythecombe21岁。他和Rosiana Pitkin至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1538年在英国戴文洛利享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ashe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Ash   1, found mainly in Ireland.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , a variant of   Ash   2.

History: This is the name of a prominent NC family; John Baptist Ashe settled in NC before 1720. It is not known where he came from: his personal name suggests that he may have been of French extraction, perhaps originally named Jean-Baptiste Dufresne.

variants.name: Ash
meanings: English: from Middle English asche ‘ash tree’ (Old English æsc), hence a topographic name for someone living by an ash tree or a habitational name from any of the many places in southern and central England named with this word (Derbyshire, Dorset, Hampshire, Herefordshire, Kent, Surrey, Shropshire, Somerset, and elsewhere).
Americanized form of German   Asch   and   Esch  , the latter ultimately also of Swiss German origin (see   Oesch  ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , with the same meaning as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Ashe was born about 1445, in Throwleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Ashe ,MP, was 26 and his mother, Alice Wythecombe, was 21. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Rosiana Pitkin. He died in 1538, in Throwleigh, Devon, England, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Ashe est né environ 1445, à Throwleigh, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Ashe ,MP, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Wythecombe, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Rosiana Pitkin. Il est décédé en 1538, à Throwleigh, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Ashe um 1445 in Throwleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Ashe ,MP 26 und seine Mutter Alice Wythecombe 21. Er hatte mit Rosiana Pitkin mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1538 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Throwleigh, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Ashe è nato il circa 1445 nel Throwleigh, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Ashe ,MP, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Alice Wythecombe, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Rosiana Pitkin. Morì nel 1538, nel Throwleigh, Devon, England, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Asheが約1445年にイギリスイギリスデボンスロウレイグで生まれた時，父Sir John Ashe ,MPは26歳，母Alice Wythecombeは21歳であった。彼はRosiana Pitkinとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1538年にイギリスデボンスロウレイグで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Ashe(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스로우리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Ashe ,MP(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Wythecombe(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Rosiana Pitkin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 영국 데폰 스로우리에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Ashe nasceu aproximadamente 1445, em Throwleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Ashe ,MP, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice Wythecombe, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Rosiana Pitkin. Ele faleceu em 1538, em Throwleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Ashe родился около 1445 г. в местности троулиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Ashe ,MP было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Wythecombe, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Rosiana Pitkin. Он умер в 1538 г. в местности троулиг, девон, Англия в возрасте 94 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Ashe nació aproximadamente 1445, en Throwleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Ashe ,MP, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice Wythecombe, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Rosiana Pitkin. Murió en 1538, en Throwleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 94 años.
